prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_336 Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): Essential Wilderness Existing Title: 26pc Emergency Camping Bottle Kit Description: We have included some crucial quality items such as a 7" full tang survival knife with magnesium fire starter. Other key items include: cable ties, hand warmer & more

Great for camping, hiking, boating, & adventures.

Leave one in the car, boat, trailer, or anywhere emergencies might happen!

Package Includes:
-(1) 32oz BPA Free Water Bottle
-(1) 7-1 Survival Whistle
-(1) Survival Knife w/ Fire Starer
-(1) Knife Sharpener Stone Stick
-(1) Emergency Mylar Blanket
-(1) Hand Warmer
-(4) InstaCloth Expandable Tablets
-(3) Heavy Duty Safety Pins S M L
-(12) 12" Cable Zip Ties Search Terms: hiking gear Features: - 32oz BPA Free Plastic Sport Bottle - 7-1 Survival Whistle: LED Light, Whistle, Mirror, Thermometer,Small Storage Compartment, Compass, & Magnify Glass. - Stainless Steel 7" Full Tang Survival Knife w/ Fire Starter - Knife Sharpener Stone - InstaCloth Washcloth Towelette Tablets. Just Add Water! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Essential Wilderness 26pc Emergency Camping Survival Kit

openai.item_name: Essential Wilderness 26-Pc Emergency Camping Bottle Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7 Inch Full Tang Knife, Fire Starter, Whistle, Water Bottle, Mylar Blanket, Hand Warmer, Hiking Gear

openai.title_differentiation: 32Oz BPA-Free Water Bottle, 7-In-1 Whistle With LED Light, Survival Knife With Fire Starter, Mylar Blanket, Cable Ties
